case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MARY STEINER et al

docket_entries.description: AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
